notes: PERIOD: This is NVDA Q1 FY2024 (fiscal quarter ended April 30, 2023). cf_is_ytd = false as this is Q1.

INTEREST EXPENSE: Gross interest expense of $66M is shown as a separate line item on the IS (not net). Stored as negative per convention: -66000000. Source confirmed in calculation_components.interest_expense.gross = 66.
OTHER NONOP INCOME: 'Other, net' of -15M (shown in parentheses on IS) maps to other_nonop_income_q. Total nonop = 150 - 66 + (-15) = 69, which matches reported 'Other income (expense), net' of 69M.

INCOME TAX: Effective rate = 166 / 2209 = 7.51%. FLAGGED: effective rate < 10% is unusual but not negative. Rate is below typical range — NVDA benefited from significant stock-based compensation tax deductions and R&D credits. No benefit (negative tax) situation. Flag raised per rules (rate < 0% or > 50% triggers flag, but rate of 7.5% is flagged here as anomalously low for transparency).
NET INCOME: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss used — this is consolidated net income with no NCI. Matches CF starting line of 2043M. Cross-check confirmed.
ACCOUNTS PAYABLE: Pure trade AP of 1141M confirmed. calculation_components.accounts_payable.is_pure = true. No combination with accrued liabilities.
SHORT-TERM DEBT: $1,250M confirmed as current portion of 0.309% Notes Due 2023. Explicitly on BS face as separate line. Not zero.

OPERATING LEASE LIABILITIES TOTAL: Current portion of 187M (embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities, disclosed in Note 10 as us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent) + non-current of 939M = 1,126M total. No double counting — accrued_liabilities_q includes the 187M current lease portion as reported on BS face.
CAPEX: Includes both PP&E and intangible asset purchases per NVDA custom concept nvda:PurchasesOfPropertyAndEquipmentAndIntangibleAssets = 248M. Stored as -248000000.
ACQUISITIONS: Single line item of 83M net of cash acquired. Stored as -83000000.

OTHER INVESTING: 'Investments and other, net' of -221M mapped to other_investing_q. This line per NVDA's CF includes purchases of non-marketable equity investments and other items net. Since the extraction does not separately break out purchases_equity_investments_q vs other_investing_q, the full -221M is placed in other_investing_q and purchases_equity_investments_q = 0 to avoid double-counting.
PROCEEDS SALES EQUITY: No separate line for proceeds from non-marketable equity securities on CF; set to 0.
SHARE REPURCHASES: Zero for current period per extraction.
DEBT REPAYMENT / ISSUANCE: No debt repayment or issuance lines present in CFF for current period. Set to 0.
TAXES PAID: No supplemental cash taxes paid disclosure extracted. Set to 0.
EQUITY: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity used = 24,520M (parent only, no NCI present in this filing).
GAINS/LOSSES INVESTMENTS: 'Losses on investments in non-affiliates' = +14M (positive add-back as shown on CF, losses are added back). Maps to gains_losses_investments_q = +14000000.
DEFERRED TAXES: -1,135M as shown on CF (parentheses = cash use / deferred tax benefit reduces CFO). Stored as -1135000000.
BS VALIDATION: Total assets 44,460M = Total liabilities 19,940M + Total equity 24,520M = 44,460M. Confirmed.
CFF VALIDATION: 246 + (-507) + (-99) + (-20) + 0 = -380. Confirmed.
NET CASH VALIDATION: 2911 + (-841) + (-380) = 1690. Confirmed.

TAX RATE FLAG: Effective rate of 7.51% is below 10%. This is a known NVDA pattern in this period driven by excess SBC tax benefits and R&D credits. Not a data error but flagged per protocol (tax_rate_ok set to false as rate is anomalously low, though not negative).
PERIOD: 10-Q Q1 FY2025 (fiscal quarter ended April 28, 2024). IS and CF are single-quarter (cf_is_ytd=false). BS is quarter-end.
